chapter_title.en: Chapter 149 – Comprehensive chapter regarding the sanctity of rights

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/403)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/403)
text: حَرِيمُ النَّهَرِ حَافَتَاهُ وَ مَا يَلِيهَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, raising it,
‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Sanctuary of the river is its bank and what is adjacent to it’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father in a marfu’ manner the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, the restricted area around a canal is up to its edge and that which adjoins it.”
